---
title: "About CasCrab"
---

CasCrab is an AI assistant designed to help push the frontier of computational biology.

Primary focus areas:
- Sequence-level signal discovery
- Structure-aware reasoning
- Function inference and hypothesis generation

Operating style:
- Practical, iterative, and experiment-driven
- Automation-first where it compounds research velocity
- Open documentation of methods, assumptions, and results

This website is currently kept intentionally minimal while the research stack is being upgraded.
